verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ከመ ፡ ጐንደየ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወሪደ ፡ እምደብር ፡ ተንሥአ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወይቤልዎ
                  ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ ወግበር ፡ ለነ ፡ አማልክተ ፡ እለ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ ቅድሜነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዝክቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ዘአውፅአነ ፡
                  እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ኢናአምር ፡ ምንተ ፡ ኮነ ።

translations.lxx: And when the people saw that Moses delayed to come down from the mountain, the people combined against Aaron, and said to him, Arise and make us gods who shall go before us; for this Moses, the man who brought us forth out of the land of Egypt—we do not know what is become of him.
translations.kjv: And when the people saw that Moses delayed to come down out of the mount, the people gathered themselves together unto Aaron, and said unto him, Up, make us gods, which shall go before us; for as for this Moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we wot not what is become of him.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ አሮን ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ሰርጐ ፡ [ወርቅ ፡] ዘውስተ ፡ እዝነ ፡ አንስቲያክሙ ፡ ወአዋልዲክሙ ፡ ወአምጽኡ ፡ ኀቤየ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron says to them, Take off the golden ear-rings which are in the ears of your wives and daughters, and bring them to me.
translations.kjv: And Aaron said unto them, Break off the golden earrings, which are in the ears of your wives, of your sons, and of your daughters, and bring them unto me.

verses.geez: ወነሥኡ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ሰርጐ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ አእዛኒሆሙ ፡ ወአምጽኡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አሮን ።

translations.lxx: And all the people took off the golden ear-rings that were in their ears, and brought them to Aaron.
translations.kjv: And all the people brake off the golden earrings which were in their ears, and brought them unto Aaron.

verses.geez:
ወተመጠወ ፡ እምእደዊሆሙ ፡ ወመሰሎ ፡ በሥዕል ፡ ወገብሮ ፡ ላህመ ፡ ስብኮ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ አማልክቲከ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ እለ ፡ አውፅኡከ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And he received them at their hands, and formed them with a graving tool; and he made them a molten calf, and said, These are thy gods, O Israel, which have brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And he received them at their hand, and fashioned it with a graving tool, after he had made it a molten calf: and they said, These be thy gods, O Israel, which brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ኤሮን ፡ ነደቀ ፡ ምሥዋዐ ፡ አንጻሮ ፡ ወአዖደ ፡ አሮን ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ በዓለ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ጌሠመ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron having seen it built an altar before it, and Aaron made proclamation saying, To-morrow is a feast of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And when Aaron saw it, he built an altar before it; and Aaron made proclamation, and said, To morrow is a feast to the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወጌሠ ፡ አሮን ፡ በሳኒታ ፡ ወአዕረገ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ወአብአ ፡ ቍርባነ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕተ ፡ ፍርቃን ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡
                  ወይበልዑ ፡ ወይሰትዩ ፡ ወተንሥኡ ፡ ይትወነዩ ።

translations.lxx: And having risen early on the morrow, he offered whole burnt-offerings, and offered a peace-offering; and the people sat down to eat and drink, and rose up to play.
translations.kjv: And they rose up early on the morrow, and offered burnt offerings, and brought peace offerings; and the people sat down to eat and to drink, and rose up to play.

verses.geez:
ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ሑር ፡ ወአፍጥን ፡ ወሪደ ፡ እምዝየ ፡ እስመ ፡ አበሱ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡
                  ዘአውፃእከ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying, Go quickly, descend hence, for thy people whom thou broughtest out of the land of Egypt have transgressed;
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Go, get thee down; for thy people, which thou broughtest out of the land of Egypt, have corrupted themselves:

verses.geez:
ወዐለዉ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ እንተ ፡ አዘዝካሆሙ ፡ ወገብሩ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ላህመ ፡ ወሰገዱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወሦዑ ፡ ሎቱ
                  ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ አማልክቲከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እለ ፡ አውፅኡከ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: they have quickly gone out of the way which thou commandedst; they have made for themselves a calf, and worshipped it, and sacrificed to it, and said, These are thy gods, O Israel, who brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: They have turned aside quickly out of the way which I commanded them: they have made them a molten calf, and have worshipped it, and have sacrificed thereunto, and said, These be thy gods, O Israel, which have brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ኅድገኒ ፡ ወተምዒዕየ ፡ በመዐትየ ፡ እጥስዮሙ ፡ ወእሬስየከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: And now let me alone, and I will be very angry with them and consume them, and I will make thee a great nation.
translations.kjv: Now therefore let me alone, that my wrath may wax hot against them, and that I may consume them: and I will make of thee a great nation.

verses.geez:
ወሰአለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አምላኩ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ለምንት ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ መዐተ ፡ ትትመዓዕ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ዘአውፃእከ
                  ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በኀይል ፡ ልዑል ፡ ወበመዝራዕት ፡ ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses prayed before the Lord God, and said, Wherefore, O Lord, art thou very angry with thy people, whom thou broughtest out of the land of Egypt with great strength, and with thy high arm?
translations.kjv: And Moses besought the LORD his God, and said, LORD, why doth thy wrath wax hot against thy people, which thou hast brought forth out of the land of Egypt with great power, and with a mighty hand?

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ኢይበሉ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በእኩይ ፡ ኤውፅኦሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይቅትሎሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አድባር ፡ ወያጥፍኦሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ አቍርር ፡ መዓተከ ፡ ዘተምዕዕከ ፡ ወመሓሬ ፡ ኩን ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እከዮሙ ፡ ለሕዝብከ ።

translations.lxx: Take heed lest at any time the Egyptians speak, saying, With evil intent he brought them out to slay them in the mountains, and to consume them from off the earth; cease from thy wrathful anger, and be merciful to the sin of thy people,
translations.kjv: Wherefore should the Egyptians speak, and say, For mischief did he bring them out, to slay them in the mountains, and to consume them from the face of the earth? Turn from thy fierce wrath, and repent of this evil against thy people.

verses.geez:
ተዘከር ፡ አብርሃምሃ ፡ ወይስሐቅሃ ፡ ወያዕቆብሃ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ እለ ፡ መሐልከ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ በርእስከ ፡ ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ብዙኀ
                  ፡ አበዝኆ ፡ ለዘርእክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ከዋክብተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ በብዝኅ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ እሁብ ፡ ለዘርእክሙ ፡ ወይምልክዋ ፡
                  ለዓለም ።

translations.lxx: remembering Abraam and Isaac and Jacob thy servants, to whom thou hast sworn by thyself, and hast spoken to them, saying, I will greatly multiply your seed as the stars of heaven for multitude, and all this land which thou spokest of to give to them, so that they shall possess it for ever.
translations.kjv: Remember Abraham, Isaac, and Israel, thy servants, to whom thou swarest by thine own self, and saidst unto them, I will multiply your seed as the stars of heaven, and all this land that I have spoken of will I give unto your seed, and they shall inherit it for ever.

verses.geez: ወሰረየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በእንተ ፡ እኪት ፡ እንተ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ይግበር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሕዝቡ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord was prevailed upon to preserve his people.
translations.kjv: And the LORD repented of the evil which he thought to do unto his people.

verses.geez:
ወተመይጠ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወወረደ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወ፪ጽላተ ፡ ዘትእዛዝ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊሁ ፡ ጽላት ፡ ዘእብን ፡
                  ጽሑፋት ፡ እንተ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ገበዋቲሆን ፡ እንተ ፡ ለፌኒ ፡ ወእንተ ፡ ለፌኒ ፡ ጽሑፋት ።

translations.lxx: And Moses turned and went down from the mountain, and the two tables of testimony were in his hands, tables of stone written on both their sides: they were written within and without.
translations.kjv: And Moses turned, and went down from the mount, and the two tables of the testimony were in his hand: the tables were written on both their sides; on the one side and on the other were they written.

verses.geez: ወጽላቶን ፡ ግብረተ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ ወጽሕፈቶንሂ ፡ ጽሕፈተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ግሉፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጽሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the tables were the work of God, and the writing the writing of God written on the tables.
translations.kjv: And the tables were the work of God, and the writing was the writing of God, graven upon the tables.

verses.geez: ወሰሚዖ ፡ ዮሳዕ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይጸርሑ ፡ ይቤሎ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ [ድ]ምፀ ፡ ፀባኢት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua having heard the voice of the people crying, says to Moses, There is a noise of war in the camp.
translations.kjv: And when Joshua heard the noise of the people as they shouted, he said unto Moses, There is a noise of war in the camp.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ድምፅ ፡ ዘመላእክት ፡ እለ ፡ ይትኄየሉ ፡ ወኢኮነ ፡ ድምፀ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ፀብእ ፡
                  አላ ፡ ድምፀ ፡ መላእክቱ ፡ ለወይን ፡ እሰምዕ ፡ አንሰ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses says, It is not the voice of them that begin the battle, nor the voice of them that begin the cry of defeat, but the voice of them that begin the banquet of wine do I hear.
translations.kjv: And he said, It is not the voice of them that shout for mastery, neither is it the voice of them that cry for being overcome: but the noise of them that sing do I hear.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ቀርበ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለትዕይንት ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ወተውኔት ፡ ወተምዕዐ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወገደፎን ፡ እምውስተ
                  ፡ እደዊሁ ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ጽላት ፡ ወቀጥቀጦን ፡ በታሕተ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And when he drew nigh to the camp, he sees the calf and the dances; and Moses being very angry cast the two tables out of his hands, and broke them to pieces under the mountain.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as soon as he came nigh unto the camp, that he saw the calf, and the dancing: and Moses’ anger waxed hot, and he cast the tables out of his hands, and brake them beneath the mount.

verses.geez:
ወነሥኦ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ዘገብሩ ፡ ወአውዐዮ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ወሐረጾ ፡ ወአድቀቆ ፡ ወዘረዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማይ ፡
                  ወአስተዮሙ ፡ ኪያሁ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And having taken the calf which they made, he consumed it with fire, and ground it very small, and scattered it on the water, and made the children of Israel to drink it.
translations.kjv: And he took the calf which they had made, and burnt it in the fire, and ground it to powder, and strawed it upon the water, and made the children of Israel drink of it.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ምንተ ፡ ረሰይከ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታምጽእ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ዐቢየ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to Aaron, What has this people done to thee, that thou hast brought upon them a great sin?
translations.kjv: And Moses said unto Aaron, What did this people unto thee, that thou hast brought so great a sin upon them?

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ አሮን ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ኢተትመዓዕ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ለሊከ ፡ ታአምር ፡ ግዕዞሙ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron said to Moses, Be not angry, my lord, for thou knowest the impetuosity of this people.
translations.kjv: And Aaron said, Let not the anger of my lord wax hot: thou knowest the people, that they are set on mischief.

verses.geez:
ሶበ ፡ ይቤሉኒ ፡ ግበር ፡ ለነ ፡ አማልክተ ፡ እለ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ ቅድሜነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዝክቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ዘአውፅአነ
                  ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ኢናአምር ፡ ምንተ ፡ ኮነ ፤

translations.lxx: For they say to me, Make us gods, which shall go before us; for as for this man Moses, who brought us out of Egypt, we do not know what is become of him.
translations.kjv: For they said unto me, Make us gods, which shall go before us: for as for this Moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we wot not what is become of him.

verses.geez:
ወእቤሎሙ ፡ ዘቦ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ አምጽኡ ፡ ወአምጽኡ ፡ ወወሀቡኒ ፡ ወወረውክዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወወፅአ ፡
                  ዝንቱ ፡ ላህም ።

translations.lxx: And I said to them, If any one has golden ornaments, take them off; and they gave them me, and I cast them into the fire, and there came out this calf.
translations.kjv: And I said unto them, Whosoever hath any gold, let them break it off. So they gave it me: then I cast it into the fire, and there came out this calf.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዐለዉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወአዕለዎሙ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወኮኑ ፡ ሣሕቀ ፡ ለጸላእቶሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And when Moses saw that the people was scattered,—for Aaron had scattered them so as to be a rejoicing to their enemies,—
translations.kjv: And when Moses saw that the people were naked; (for Aaron had made them naked unto their shame among their enemies:)

verses.geez:
ወቆመ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ዘኀርየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይምጻእ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወተጋብኡ ፡ ኀቤሁ
                  ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ።

translations.lxx: then stood Moses at the gate of the camp, and said, Who is on the Lord's side? let him come to me. Then all the sons of Levi came to him.
translations.kjv: Then Moses stood in the gate of the camp, and said, Who is on the LORD’s side? let him come unto me. And all the sons of Levi gathered themselves together unto him.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ይጹር ፡ ሰይፎ ፡ ወብጽሑ ፡
                  እምአንቀጽ ፡ እስከ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወአሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ይቅትል ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ወአሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ይቅትል ፡ ካልኦ ፡
                  ወአሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ይቅትል ፡ ዘቅሩቡ ።

translations.lxx: And he says to them, Thus saith the Lord God of Israel, Put every one his sword on his thigh, and go through and return from gate to gate through the camp, and slay every one his brother, and every one his neighbour, and every one him that is nearest to him.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Put every man his sword by his side, and go in and out from gate to gate throughout the camp, and slay every man his brother, and every man his companion, and every man his neighbour.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤሎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወወድቀ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ፴፻ብእሲ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Levi did as Moses spoke to them, and there fell of the people in that day to the number of three thousand men.
translations.kjv: And the children of Levi did according to the word of Moses: and there fell of the people that day about three thousand men.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ አንፈስክምዎ ፡ በእደዊክሙ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዮም ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ እምውሉዱ ፡
                  ወእምእኁሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትትወሀብ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ በረከት ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to them, Ye have filled your hands this day to the Lord each one on his son or on his brother, so that blessing should be given to you.
translations.kjv: For Moses had said, Consecrate yourselves today to the LORD, even every man upon his son, and upon his brother; that he may bestow upon you a blessing this day.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ በሳኒታ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ጌገይክሙ ፡ ጌጋየ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ አዐርግ ፡ ኀበ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ አስተስሪ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኀጢአተክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass after the morrow had begun, that Moses said to the people, Ye have sinned a great sin; and now I will go up to God, that I may make atonement for your sin.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass on the morrow, that Moses said unto the people, Ye have sinned a great sin: and now I will go up unto the LORD; peradventure I shall make an atonement for your sin.

verses.geez:
ወገብአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይቤ ፡ እስእለከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ አባሲ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ አበሳ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡
                  ወገብሩ ፡ አማልክተ ፡ ዘወርቅ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses returned to the Lord and said, I pray, O Lord, this people has sinned a great sin, and they have made for themselves golden gods.
translations.kjv: And Moses returned unto the LORD, and said, Oh, this people have sinned a great sin, and have made them gods of gold.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ እመ ፡ ተኀደግ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ኅድግ ፡ ወእማእኮ ፡ ደምስስ ፡ ኪያየኒ ፡ እምነ ፡ መጽሐፍከ ፡
                  ዘጸሐፍከኒ ።

translations.lxx: And now if thou wilt forgive their sin, forgive it; and if not, blot me out of thy book, which thou hast written.
translations.kjv: Yet now, if thou wilt forgive their sin--; and if not, blot me, I pray thee, out of thy book which thou hast written.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ለዝክቱ ፡ ዘአበሰ ፡ በቅድሜየ ፡ እደመስሶ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መጽሐፍየ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, If any one has sinned against me, I will blot them out of my book.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Whosoever hath sinned against me, him will I blot out of my book.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ሑር ፡ ወምርሖሙ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ዘእቤለከ ፡ ናሁ ፡ መልአኪየ ፡ የሐውር ፡ ቅድመ ፡
                  ገጽከ ፤ አመ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ እዋኅዮሙ ፡ ኣገብእ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ኀጢአቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And now go, descend, and lead this people into the place of which I spoke to thee: behold, my angel shall go before thy face; and in the day when I shall visit I will bring upon them their sin.
translations.kjv: Therefore now go, lead the people unto the place of which I have spoken unto thee: behold, mine Angel shall go before thee: nevertheless in the day when I visit I will visit their sin upon them.

verses.geez: ወቀተለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምሕዝብ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዘገብሩ ፡ ላህመ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ አሮን ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord smote the people for the making of the calf, which Aaron made.
translations.kjv: And the LORD plagued the people, because they made the calf, which Aaron made.
